SELECT DISTINCT s.Name
FROM singer s
JOIN singer_in_concert sic ON s.Singer_ID = sic.Singer_ID
JOIN concert c ON sic.concert_ID = c.concert_ID
WHERE c.Year = '2014';
final.answer_text: The following singers performed in concerts in 2014: Timbaland, Justin Brown, John Nizinik, Tribal King, and Rose White.
